description.en-US: AI-powered end-to-end testing platform with iteration management, PRD parsing, story decomposition, test case generation, UI automation, report generation, defect sync, and knowledge base archiving.
description.zh-CN: 基于 AI 的端到端测试平台，覆盖迭代管理、需求解析、Story 拆解、测试用例生成、UI 自动化、报告生成、缺陷同步和知识库归档。
